languages.original_text: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

languages.text: "Всякий, верующий в Бога-Императора, отправляет обряды сообразно своему разумению и установленным канонам. Но из уважения и обязательств, возлагаемых на меня саном, я должен проинформировать тебя, Кибелла: постоянные истязания плоти редко идут ей на пользу".

"Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

"Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

languages.text: «Todo creyente en el Dios Emperador practica los ritos de acuerdo con su propia comprensión y los cánones establecidos. Pero, por respeto y por las obligaciones de mi rango, debo decirle, Kibellah, que el abuso constante de la carne no suele ser beneficioso».
languages.original_text: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

traits.locale_text: «Todo creyente en el Dios Emperador practica los ritos de acuerdo con su propia comprensión y los cánones establecidos. Pero, por respeto y por las obligaciones de mi rango, debo decirle, Kibellah, que el abuso constante de la carne no suele ser beneficioso».

languages.text: 「神帝陛下を信じる者は皆、自らの理解と確立された規範に従って儀式を執り行います。しかし、敬意と、私の位階によって課された義務から申し上げますが、キベラ、肉体を絶えず痛めつけることが益となることは、めったにありません」
languages.original_text: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

traits.locale_text: 「神帝陛下を信じる者は皆、自らの理解と確立された規範に従って儀式を執り行います。しかし、敬意と、私の位階によって課された義務から申し上げますが、キベラ、肉体を絶えず痛めつけることが益となることは、めったにありません」

languages.text: “每一位神皇信徒都按自己的理解和既定教规来践行仪式。但出于尊重，以及我职阶所赋予的责任，我必须告知你，绮贝菈，持续摧残肉体很少有什么益处。”
languages.original_text: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

traits.locale_text: “每一位神皇信徒都按自己的理解和既定教规来践行仪式。但出于尊重，以及我职阶所赋予的责任，我必须告知你，绮贝菈，持续摧残肉体很少有什么益处。”

languages.text: "Jeder Gläubige des Gottimperators praktiziert die Riten im Einklang mit seinem eigenen Verständnis und den etablierten Vorschriften. Aber aus Respekt und aufgrund der mit meinem Rang verbundenen Verpflichtungen muss ich Euch informieren, Kibellah, dass die kontinuierliche Brutalisierung des Fleisches nur selten vorteilhaft ist."
languages.original_text: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

traits.locale_text: "Jeder Gläubige des Gottimperators praktiziert die Riten im Einklang mit seinem eigenen Verständnis und den etablierten Vorschriften. Aber aus Respekt und aufgrund der mit meinem Rang verbundenen Verpflichtungen muss ich Euch informieren, Kibellah, dass die kontinuierliche Brutalisierung des Fleisches nur selten vorteilhaft ist."

languages.text: « Chacun des fidèles de l'Empereur-Dieu pratique les rites en fonction de sa propre interprétation du dogme. Cependant, en tant que genetor, il m'incombe de vous informer que la violence constante envers la chair porte rarement ses fruits, Kibellah. »
languages.original_text: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

traits.locale_text: « Chacun des fidèles de l'Empereur-Dieu pratique les rites en fonction de sa propre interprétation du dogme. Cependant, en tant que genetor, il m'incombe de vous informer que la violence constante envers la chair porte rarement ses fruits, Kibellah. »

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'a inanan herkes, ayinleri kendi anlayışına ve yerleşik nizamnamelere göre uygular. Ancak saygımdan ve mevkimin bana yüklediği yükümlülüklerden ötürü seni bilgilendirmeliyim ki Kibellah, bedenin sürekli vahşileştirilmesi nadiren faydalıdır."
languages.original_text: "Every believer in the God-Emperor practices the rites in accordance with their own understanding and the established canons. But out of respect and the obligations conferred upon me by my rank, I must inform you, Kibellah, that constant brutalisation of the flesh is rarely beneficial."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'a inanan herkes, ayinleri kendi anlayışına ve yerleşik nizamnamelere göre uygular. Ancak saygımdan ve mevkimin bana yüklediği yükümlülüklerden ötürü seni bilgilendirmeliyim ki Kibellah, bedenin sürekli vahşileştirilmesi nadiren faydalıdır."
